zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Collett於1485年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特時，他的父親William Collett31歲，母親Sadie O'Mally29歲。他於1507年與Lady Alice Curwen在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Collett于1485年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特时，他的父亲William Collett31岁，母亲Sadie O'Mally29岁。他于1507年与Lady Alice Curwen在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾武坡 斯勞特聖 比特也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Collett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the personal name Col(l), a pet form of Nicholas . There was also a feminine form, Collette, which may also have given rise to a surname. The name could also mean ‘Coll the younger’.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: English (southwestern England and south Wales) and Dutch: from the personal name Nicholas (from Latin Nicolaus, from Greek Nikolaos, from nikān ‘to conquer’ + laos ‘people’). Forms with -ch- are due to hypercorrection (compare Anthony ). The name in various vernacular forms was popular among Christians throughout Europe in the Middle Ages, largely as a result of the fame of a 4th-century Lycian bishop, about whom a large number of legends grew up, and who was venerated in the Orthodox Church as well as the Catholic. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ), Greek Papanikolaou ‘(son of) Nicholas the priest’ and Nikolopoulos . Compare Nickolas .

History: The colonial official and revolutionary patriot Robert Carter Nicholas was from a prominent VA family on both sides. His father was a British navy surgeon who emigrated c. 1700 from Lancashire, England, to Williamsburg, VA.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Collett was born in 1485, in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Collett, was 31 and his mother, Sadie O'Mally, was 29. He married Lady Alice Curwen in 1507, in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Collett est né en 1485, à Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Collett, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sadie O'Mally, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Curwen en 1507, à St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Collett 1485 in Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Collett 31 und seine Mutter Sadie O'Mally 29. Er hat 1507 in St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice Curwen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1538 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Collett è nato il nel 1485 nel Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Collett, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Sadie O'Mally, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Curwen nel 1507, nel St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. ko.Saint Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, C: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Collett(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Collett(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Sadie O'Mally(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1507년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 업퍼 슬로그h터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 Lady Alice Curwen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Collett nasceu em 1485, em Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Collett, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sadie O'Mally, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Curwen em 1507, em St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1538, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, C: ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Collett родился в 1485 г. в местности уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Collett было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sadie O'Mally, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Curwen в 1507 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, уппир слотир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Collett nació en 1485, en Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Collett, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Sadie O'Mally, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Curwen en 1507, en St Peter's Church, Upper Slaughter, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1538, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
